title: Successful sign up redirects to dashboard and shows KPI cards
description: Verifies a new user can register with valid details and is redirected to the dashboard where KPI cards are visible.

steps.description: Type "Test User" into the name input field
Type "new.user+e2e.001@example.com" into the email input field
Type "ValidPassw0rd!" into the password input field
Click on the "Sign Up" button to submit

title: Sign up shows validation errors for invalid email format and too-short password
description: Verifies the sign up form displays an error message when email format is invalid and password is too short.

steps.description: Type "Invalid Email User" into the name input field
Type "invalid-email-format" into the email input field
Type "123" into the password input field
Click on the "Sign Up" button to submit

title: Sign up prevents submission when required fields are empty
description: Verifies the form shows a visible error when attempting to submit without filling required fields.

steps.description: Click on the "Sign Up" button to submit

title: Sign up rejects password that is too short even with valid email
description: Verifies a valid email with an invalid short password results in a visible validation error and no redirect.

steps.description: Type "Short Password User" into the name input field
Type "new.user+e2e.shortpw@example.com" into the email input field
Type "short" into the password input field
Click on the "Sign Up" button to submit

title: Sign up rejects malformed email even with strong password
description: Verifies a malformed email triggers a visible validation error and user remains on the sign up page.

steps.description: Type "Bad Email User" into the name input field
Type "user@" into the email input field
Type "ValidPassw0rd!" into the password input field
Click on the "Sign Up" button to submit

title: Successful sign up works via Enter key submission from password field
description: Verifies the form can be submitted using the Enter key and still redirects to the dashboard on success.

steps.description: Type "Enter Submit User" into the name input field
Type "new.user+e2e.enter.001@example.com" into the email input field
Type "ValidPassw0rd!" into the password input field

title: Sign up page loads and displays required inputs
description: Verifies the sign up page renders and the key form fields are visible to the user.

title: Dashboard displays all KPI cards and recent activity feed
description: Verifies the authenticated user can view all KPI cards and the recent activity list on the Dashboard.

steps.description: Verify text "Low Stock Items" is visible

title: Dashboard KPI cards show all four KPI sections
description: Verifies the Dashboard shows the four expected KPI sections: total stock, low stock items, daily movements, and active locations.

title: Quick action: Register Sale navigates to Movements page
description: Verifies the "Register Sale" quick action takes the user from the Dashboard to the Movements page.

steps.description: Click on the quick action button "Register Sale"

title: Quick action: Receive Stock navigates to Movements and shows movement registration UI
description: Verifies the "Receive Stock" quick action navigates to Movements and a movement registration UI is available.

steps.description: Click on the quick action button "Receive Stock"

title: Quick action: Transfer Stock is present and navigates to Movements
description: Verifies the Dashboard displays the "Transfer Stock" quick action and it routes to the Movements page when clicked.

steps.description: Click on the quick action button "Transfer Stock"

title: Dashboard shows non-empty numeric values (or placeholders) on KPI cards
description: Verifies KPI cards render a visible value area (number or placeholder) for each KPI card.

steps.description: Verify element "Low Stock Items" is visible

title: Recent activity section is visible and scrollable into view
description: Verifies the recent activity section can be brought into view and is visible on the Dashboard.

title: Create a new product and confirm it appears in the list with a status indicator
description: Verifies an authenticated user can create a product from the Add Product dialog and see it listed with a visible status indicator.

steps.description: Click on "Products" in the sidebar navigation

title: Complete Add Product form and submit successfully
description: Verifies the Add Product dialog accepts valid inputs and creates the product successfully.

steps.description: Click on "Products" in the sidebar navigation
Fill "SKU-UI-E2E-001" into the SKU input field
Fill "UI E2E Product 001" into the product name input field

title: Search products by SKU returns matching rows
description: Verifies the product table can be narrowed by searching for a specific SKU.

steps.description: Click on "Products" in the sidebar navigation
Search products by SKU or name using "SKU"
Verify element "product list table" is visible

title: Filter products by status: In Stock
description: Verifies the status filter can be set to In Stock and the list updates accordingly.

steps.description: Click on "Products" in the sidebar navigation
Filter products by status (All, In Stock, Low Stock, Out of Stock) by selecting "In Stock"
Verify element "product list table" is visible

title: Filter products by status: Low Stock
description: Verifies the status filter can be set to Low Stock and the list updates accordingly.

steps.description: Click on "Products" in the sidebar navigation
Filter products by status (All, In Stock, Low Stock, Out of Stock) by selecting "Low Stock"
Verify element "product list table" is visible

title: Submit Add Product with required fields empty shows validation errors
description: Verifies client-side validation messages appear when submitting the Add Product form without required fields.

steps.description: Click on "Products" in the sidebar navigation

title: Register an inbound movement with note and verify it appears at top of log
description: Verifies a user can register an Inbound stock movement and see it appear as the newest entry in the movement log.

steps.description: Click the "Register Movement" button to open the dialog
Select a product from the product dropdown
Select "Inbound" from the movement type dropdown
Select a location from the "To location" dropdown
Type "Inbound test movement" into the note field
Verify text "Inbound" is visible in the movement log table
Verify text "5" is visible in the movement log table

title: Register an outbound movement and verify it appears in log with outbound type
description: Verifies a user can register an Outbound stock movement and see it listed in the movement log.

steps.description: Click the "Register Movement" button to open the dialog
Select a product from the product dropdown
Select "Outbound" from the movement type dropdown
Select a location from the "From location" dropdown
Verify text "Outbound" is visible in the movement log table
Verify text "2" is visible in the movement log table

title: Validate required fields: missing product or quantity blocks submission
description: Verifies validation errors appear and submission is prevented when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Click the "Register Movement" button to open the dialog
Select "Inbound" from the movement type dropdown

title: Transfer requires both from and to locations
description: Verifies transfer movement validation requires both source and destination locations.

steps.description: Click the "Register Movement" button to open the dialog
Select a product from the product dropdown
Select "Transfer" from the movement type dropdown
Select a location from the "From location" dropdown

title: Filter movement log by type and verify only matching type is shown
description: Verifies the movement log can be filtered by movement type using the UI filter control.

steps.description: Select "Inbound" from the movement type filter dropdown
Verify text "Inbound" is visible in the movement log table

title: Register an adjustment movement and verify it appears in the log
description: Verifies a user can register an Adjustment movement and see it recorded in the movement log.

steps.description: Click the "Register Movement" button to open the dialog
Select a product from the product dropdown
Select "Adjustment" from the movement type dropdown
Select a location from the relevant location dropdown
Type "Cycle count adjustment" into the note field
Verify text "Adjustment" is visible in the movement log table
Verify text "1" is visible in the movement log table

title: Cancel movement registration dialog without creating a movement
description: Verifies the registration dialog can be closed and no movement is added when the user cancels.

steps.description: Click the "Register Movement" button to open the dialog
Verify text "Register Movement" is not visible

title: Quantity validation: prevent zero quantity submission
description: Verifies the form blocks submission when quantity is zero.

steps.description: Click the "Register Movement" button to open the dialog
Select a product from the product dropdown
Select "Inbound" from the movement type dropdown
Select a location from the "To location" dropdown

title: Create a new location and verify it appears grouped by zone
description: Creates a new warehouse location via the Add Location dialog and verifies it appears in the list under the correct zone grouping.

title: Submit a new location with all fields set and see it listed
description: Completes the Add Location dialog with valid values (name, zone, type, capacity) and verifies the new location is visible in the locations list.

steps.description: Type "E2E Location A" into the location name input field

title: Create location with zone, type, and capacity then verify visibility in list
description: Creates a location including zone, location type, and capacity, then verifies the created location is visible in the list.

steps.description: Type "E2E Location B" into the location name input field
Type "Zone-Blue" into the zone input field
Select "shelf" from the location type dropdown
Verify text "E2E Location B" is visible

title: Verify new location appears under the correct zone grouping
description: Creates a location in a specific zone and verifies the zone grouping header and location name are both visible.

steps.description: Type "E2E Zone Group Check" into the location name input field
Type "Zone-Green" into the zone input field
Select "bin" from the location type dropdown
Verify text "E2E Zone Group Check" is visible

title: Validation: submitting with empty name shows an error
description: Attempts to create a location without a name and verifies a visible validation error is shown.

steps.description: Type "Zone-Validation" into the zone input field

title: Validation: submitting with empty zone shows an error
description: Attempts to create a location without a zone and verifies a visible validation error is shown.

steps.description: Type "E2E Missing Zone" into the location name input field

title: Verify capacity and utilization are visible on a location card
description: Verifies that a location card shows capacity and utilization percentage information in the UI.

title: Verify utilization color indicator is present on a location card
description: Checks that a utilization indicator is displayed (as a visible element) alongside utilization metrics on a location card.

title: Audit Trail - Search by SKU and display product info card and timeline
description: Verifies a valid SKU search shows the product info card and a transaction timeline.

steps.description: Click on "Audit" in the sidebar navigation
Type "SKU-TEST-001" into the SKU search input field
Verify element "Product info card" is visible

title: Audit Trail - Submit search using Enter key
description: Verifies pressing Enter in the SKU search triggers the search and renders results.

steps.description: Click on "Audit" in the sidebar navigation
Type "SKU-TEST-001" into the SKU search input field
Verify element "Product info card" is visible

title: Audit Trail - Open a timeline entry and view transaction details
description: Verifies clicking a timeline entry reveals transaction details including key fields.

steps.description: Click on "Audit" in the sidebar navigation
Type "SKU-TEST-001" into the SKU search input field
Click on the first timeline entry

title: Audit Trail - Non-existent SKU shows no results state
description: Verifies searching for a non-existent SKU shows an empty state or no-results message.

steps.description: Click on "Audit" in the sidebar navigation
Type "SKU-NOT-REAL-999999" into the SKU search input field

title: Audit Trail - Empty search submission shows validation or guidance
description: Verifies submitting an empty SKU search does not run a result timeline and shows guidance/validation.

steps.description: Click on "Audit" in the sidebar navigation

title: Audit Trail - Trim whitespace around SKU input
description: Verifies SKU searches work when the user includes leading/trailing spaces in the input.

steps.description: Click on "Audit" in the sidebar navigation
Type "  SKU-TEST-001  " into the SKU search input field
Verify element "Product info card" is visible

title: Audit Trail - Subsequent search replaces previous results
description: Verifies running a second search updates the product card and timeline to the new SKU instead of appending old results.

steps.description: Click on "Audit" in the sidebar navigation
Type "SKU-TEST-001" into the SKU search input field
Verify element "Product info card" is visible
Type "SKU-TEST-002" into the SKU search input field

title: Audit Trail - Timeline empty for valid SKU with zero movements
description: Verifies the UI handles a SKU that exists but has no movements by showing product info and an empty timeline state.

steps.description: Click on "Audit" in the sidebar navigation
Type "SKU-NO-MOVES-000" into the SKU search input field
Verify element "Product info card" is visible

title: Navigate between core pages using sidebar links (Products → Movements → Audit Trail)
description: Verifies authenticated users can use the sidebar to move between primary routes and see the correct page load each time.

title: Sidebar navigation from Dashboard to Locations
description: Verifies an authenticated user can navigate to Locations from the app shell sidebar.

title: Mobile: Open hamburger menu and navigate using the mobile sidebar sheet
description: Verifies the mobile navigation drawer opens and selecting a destination navigates to the chosen route.

steps.description: Click the navigation item "Products" in the mobile sidebar

title: Sign out from a non-dashboard page (Products)
description: Verifies sign out works consistently regardless of the current route.
